title: 2026 U.S. Senate election in Massachusetts
description: Massachusetts will elect one U.S. senator in 2026 for the state’s Class II seat. The race matters because it will determine whether incumbent Democrat Ed Markey wins another term and because the seat is part of the broader balance of power in the U.S. Senate. Massachusetts is a strongly Democratic state in federal elections, so the main competition is expected to be in the Democratic primary, where Markey faces challengers including Rep. Seth Moulton. The race has centered on generational change, Markey’s long record in Congress, and contrasting views on how aggressively Democrats should confront national politics and policy priorities.

candidates.name: Edward J. Markey
candidates.summary: Ed Markey is the incumbent U.S. senator from Massachusetts and is seeking another term in 2026. His campaign and Senate biography emphasize a long record on climate, consumer protection, telecommunications, and other progressive policy areas, along with decades of prior service in the U.S. House and Massachusetts state legislature.

summary_sources.title: About Ed | Senator Edward Markey of Massachusetts

career_history.title: U.S. Senator
career_history.description: Represents Massachusetts in the Senate; elected in a 2013 special election and seeking reelection in 2026.

career_history.title: U.S. Representative
career_history.description: Served 37 years in the House representing Massachusetts districts.

career_history.title: Member
career_history.description: Served two terms in the Massachusetts state legislature.

candidates.name: Seth Moulton
candidates.summary: Seth Moulton is a U.S. representative from Massachusetts’s 6th Congressional District and a Democratic primary challenger to Markey. His campaign biography highlights his Marine Corps service, his work in Congress, and his pitch as a newer generation of Democratic leadership focused on change and urgency.

career_history.title: Marine Corps officer
career_history.description: Served as a Marine officer, including combat service in Iraq.

career_history.title: Business and public service roles
career_history.description: Worked in business and public service before election to Congress.

candidates.name: John Deaton
candidates.summary: John Deaton is a Republican candidate for the Massachusetts Senate seat and previously ran statewide in Massachusetts. His campaign biography describes him as a Marine veteran, trial attorney, author, and advocate for people harmed by asbestos exposure and for cryptocurrency investors.

summary_sources.title: Meet John | John Deaton for U.S. Senate
5 things to know about Republican John Deaton, who's launching his second U.S. Senate run

career_history.title: Trial attorney
career_history.description: Practiced law in Massachusetts and other states, focusing on asbestos and cancer victims.

career_history.title: U.S. Marine Corps officer
career_history.description: Served as a Judge Advocate and later was medically retired.

candidates.name: William Gates
candidates.summary: William Gates is a Democratic candidate in the Massachusetts Senate race and is listed by Ballotpedia as a declared candidate in the Democratic primary. His campaign website presents him as aligned with democratic socialist ideas and focused on broad economic and social reform.

summary_sources.title: Home | William F. Gates for Senate

career_history.title: Professor and architect
career_history.description: Ballotpedia identifies him as a professor and architect.

candidates.name: Alexander Rikleen
candidates.summary: Alexander Rikleen is a Democratic candidate in the Massachusetts Senate race and is challenging Markey in the primary. His campaign biography says he is a father, history teacher, and former sports writer who argues Democrats need a more forceful response to current national politics.

summary_sources.title: Meet Alex | Democrat for Senate - Alex Rikleen

career_history.title: History teacher
career_history.description: Campaign biography says he taught history before changing careers.

career_history.title: Sports analyst / writer
career_history.description: He says he moved into sports analysis and writing after leaving teaching.

career_history.title: Volunteer
career_history.description: Campaign biography says he focused volunteer efforts at his children’s school before running for office.
